scenario_label: CYP2C9 Poor Metabolizer + VKORC1 Sensitive — Warfarin Dose Sensitivity Demo

CYP2C9.interpretation: Markedly reduced warfarin clearance. Combined with VKORC1, expected stable dose is substantially lower than population average.

VKORC1.interpretation: Reduced VKORC1 expression. Increased warfarin sensitivity.

actionable_flags_for_post_op_meds.recommendation: Reduce initial warfarin dose by 50–80%. Use IWPC/Gage pharmacogenomic dosing algorithm. Monitor INR closely during initiation.
Reduce dose moderately. Monitor INR closely.
